mapper.sql: SELECT t.ticket_id, t.ticket_no, t.title, t.content, t.category_id, t.priority, t.status, t.creator_id, t.assignee_id, t.dept_id, t.processed_at, t.closed_at, t.response_due_at, t.resolve_due_at, t.response_overdue, t.resolve_overdue, t.del_flag, t.create_by, t.create_time, t.update_by, t.update_time, t.remark FROM ticket t
mapper.select: SELECT t.ticket_id, t.title, c.category_name AS category, t.content AS description, process_log.comment AS solution, t.status, t.priority, t.create_time AS created_time, t.closed_at AS closed_time, process_log.log_id AS source_generation FROM ticket t INNER JOIN ticket_category c ON c.category_id = t.category_id INNER JOIN ticket_operation_log process_log ON process_log.log_id = ( SELECT MAX(candidate_log.log_id) FROM ticket_operation_log candidate_log WHERE candidate_log.ticket_id = t.ticket_id AND candidate_log.operation_type = 'PROCESS' AND candidate_log.comment IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(candidate_log.comment) != '' ) WHERE t.del_flag = '0' AND t.status = 'CLOSED' AND t.closed_at IS NOT NULL AND t.ticket_id > #{lastTicketId} ORDER BY t.ticket_id LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT COALESCE(MAX(ticket_id), 0) FROM ticket WHERE del_flag = '0'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ticket WHERE del_flag = '0' AND ticket_id <= #{maxTicketId}

SELECT t.ticket_id, t.ticket_no, t.title, t.content, t.category_id, c.category_name, t.priority, t.status, t.creator_id, u.nick_name AS creator_name, t.assignee_id, a.nick_name AS assignee_name, t.dept_id, d.dept_name, t.processed_at, t.closed_at, t.response_due_at, t.resolve_due_at, t.response_overdue, t.resolve_overdue, t.create_time, t.update_time, t.remark FROM ticket t LEFT JOIN ticket_category c ON c.category_id = t.category_id LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON u.user_id = t.creator_id LEFT JOIN sys_user a ON a.user_id = t.assignee_id LEFT JOIN sys_dept d ON d.dept_id = t.dept_id WHERE t.del_flag = '0' AND t.ticket_id = #{ticketId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ticket ( ticket_no, title, content, category_id, priority, status, creator_id, assignee_id, dept_id, processed_at, closed_at, response_due_at, resolve_due_at, response_overdue, resolve_overdue, del_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark ) VALUES ( #{ticketNo}, #{title}, #{content}, #{categoryId}, #{priority}, #{status}, #{creatorId}, #{assigneeId}, #{deptId}, #{processedAt}, #{closedAt}, #{responseDueAt}, #{resolveDueAt}, #{responseOverdue}, #{resolveOverdue}, #{delFlag}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime}, #{remark} )
mapper.update: UPDATE ticket SET title = #{title}, content = #{content}, category_id = #{categoryId}, priority = #{priority}, status = #{status}, assignee_id = #{assigneeId}, processed_at = #{processedAt}, closed_at = #{closedAt}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = #{updateTime}, remark = #{remark} WHERE ticket_id = #{ticketId}
UPDATE ticket SET del_flag = '2' WHERE ticket_id = #{ticketId}
mapper.select: SELECT MAX(ticket_no) FROM ticket WHERE ticket_no LIKE CONCAT(#{prefix}, '%')
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM sys_user WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND del_flag = '0' LIMIT 1

WHERE t.del_flag = '0' AND t.status != 'CANCELLED' AND t.response_overdue = '0' AND t.response_due_at IS NOT NULL AND t.response_due_at < #{detectedAt} AND (t.processed_at IS NULL OR t.processed_at > t.response_due_at) ORDER BY t.response_due_at ASC LIMIT #{limit}

WHERE t.del_flag = '0' AND t.status != 'CANCELLED' AND t.resolve_overdue = '0' AND t.resolve_due_at IS NOT NULL AND t.resolve_due_at < #{detectedAt} AND (t.closed_at IS NULL OR t.closed_at > t.resolve_due_at) ORDER BY t.resolve_due_at ASC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.update: UPDATE ticket SET response_overdue = '1' WHERE ticket_id = #{ticketId} AND response_overdue = '0' AND del_flag = '0'
UPDATE ticket SET resolve_overdue = '1' WHERE ticket_id = #{ticketId} AND resolve_overdue = '0' AND del_flag = '0'
